series_metadata.series_description: Copy of form to be completed by county board of elections verifying compliance with the Uniformed and Overseas Civilian Absentee Voting Act (UOCAVA) and submitted to the Ohio Secretary of State’s office.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) years, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) years, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
